item.title: RadioSnooker: Nick Metcalfe reposteó Radio Snooker with Nick Metcalfe @RadioSnooker · 7min WPBSA chairman Jason Ferguson joins me at t
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe reposteó Radio Snooker with Nick Metcalfe @RadioSnooker · 7min WPBSA chairman Jason Ferguson joins me at the Crucible on the eve of the World Championship. Plenty from Jason here including:
*Memories of John Virgo *New Crucible deal *Snooker clubs in UK *Saudi event next season
https:// podcasts.apple.com/gb/podcast/liv e-from-2026-world-championship-wpbsa-chairman-jason/id1778586026?i=1000762036003 …
#RadioSnooker podcasts.apple.com LIVE FROM 2026 WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP - WPBSA chairman Jason Ferguson on Crucible deal + snooker in... Podcast Episode · Radio Snooker with Nick Metcalfe · 17 April · 12min 1 1 52

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 12min 𝗨𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗕𝗨𝗖𝗛𝗡𝗘𝗥 𝗢𝗨𝗦𝗧𝗦 𝗢'𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗡𝗢𝗥
Host nation qualifier Michael Unterbuchner (95.5) produces a
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 12min 𝗨𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗕𝗨𝗖𝗛𝗡𝗘𝗥 𝗢𝗨𝗦𝗧𝗦 𝗢'𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗡𝗢𝗥
Host nation qualifier Michael Unterbuchner (95.5) produces a trio of ton-plus checkouts as he prevails in a last-leg decider to inflict another early exit on Willie O'Connor 2 561

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 14min VICTORY ON HOME SOIL!
Michael Unterbuchner wins his second ever match on the European T
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 14min VICTORY ON HOME SOIL!
Michael Unterbuchner wins his second ever match on the European Tour!
The German, who impressed with a trio of ton-plus checkouts in the contest, has beaten Willie O'Connor 6-5 to advance in Sindelfingen!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 2 3 33 4 mil

item.title: PDCResults: PDCResults @PDCResults · 16min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Round 1, William O Connor (93.70)
item.description: PDCResults @PDCResults · 16min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Round 1, William O Connor (93.70) 5 (11) 6 (95.52) Michael Unterbuchner 1 2 166

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 29min I wanted to get a strong fan view of the World Championship on this Crucible Eve he
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 29min I wanted to get a strong fan view of the World Championship on this Crucible Eve here in Sheffield and I'm so grateful to @SnookerLoopyOwl for joining me on @RadioSnooker :
